slides.headline: Stay Ahead of VA Updates
slides.body: Unlock the latest VA regulations to streamline your student certification process.

slides.headline: Understand the Yellow Ribbon
slides.body: The Yellow Ribbon Program helps veterans pay tuition. Ensure your students qualify.

slides.headline: New Chapter 33 Eligibility
slides.body: Update your COE to reflect new Chapter 33 rules.

slides.headline: Yellow Ribbon Implementation
slides.body: Implement the 22-1999 form for your students. Check the 2023 SAA letter for details.

slides.headline: Compliance Matters
slides.body: Stay compliant with new regulations. Review the current Chapter 33 rules.

slides.headline: Stay Updated
slides.body: Keep up with VA updates. Review the relevant VA guidance regularly.

outline.caption: Stay ahead of the latest VA updates to ensure your student certifications are in compliance. Review the Yellow Ribbon Program, Chapter 33 eligibility, and more. Learn more: https://aimilitaryservices.com/blog/decoding-new-va-regulations

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Read the full post' section at the bottom could be more visually distinct to draw attention to the call to action.
